name: S-Corporation Election for Single-Level Taxation

eligibility.description: Domestic corporations with no more than 100 shareholders (families treated as one), one class of stock, and only eligible shareholders (individuals, certain trusts/estates).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a small business corporation to avoid double taxation by passing income, losses, deductions, and credits through to shareholders.
